meaning: n.[医] 角化症(皮肤的角质生长)
examples: KLC has to be differentiated with lichen planus and lichen planus-like keratosis.
Objective To investigate the effective method for the treatment of Seborrheic keratosis.
DNA Content Image Quantitative Analysis of Sebaceous Keratosis and Squamous Cell Carcinomas.
ALA-based compounds are approved in the U.S. as a treatment for actinic keratosis, a precancerous skin condition, but not for acne.
